claimText: 50–70% of the foods in our supermarkets are ultra-processed.
postText: Did you know that 50–70% of the foods in our supermarkets are ultra-processed? These foods may look tasty, but they can affect your health in ways you don’t expect. claimText: Ultra processed foods increase our eating rate, disrupt our gut microbiome, and expose us to additives.
postText: Episode Overview In this eye-opening conversation, Dr Euridice Martinez-Steele, who has spent 12 years researching ultra processed foods at NUPENS (University of Sao Paulo), explains how these industrial food formulations are driving chronic disease worldwide. claimText: Ultra-processed foods are products that are manufactured using industrial processes and ingredients not commonly found in home kitchens.

claimText: Recent systematic reviews and meta analyses reveal a strong association between high UPF consumption and increased risk of several cancers, particularly those affecting the digestive system and hormone dependent organs like the breast and colon.
postText: Ultra processed foods have become a global staple, but the growing body of scientific evidence paints a far more troubling picture of their impact on human health.
